title: past operators
manager: Past-time temporal operators — once, since — for talking about what has already happened in a run, which is exactly what you need to monitor a tape after the fact ("did we ever see X before Y"). Past operators are the natural fit for runtime monitoring and post-hoc analysis, complementing the future-time operators used for ahead-of-time verification.
cs: past operators (once/since) for tape monitoring; complement the future-time temporal language (W8.2); the natural form for runtime property checking over recorded tapes.
